meanings.definition: the act of providing an item for general use or for official purposes (usually in quantity)
examples: the last issue of penicillin was over a month ago

meanings.definition: prepare and issue for public distribution or sale
circulate or distribute or equip with
examples: issue a new uniform to the children

meanings.definition: bring out an official document (such as a warrant)

examples: Water issued from the hole in the wall
The words seemed to come out by themselves
Please make the check out to me
